metadata.description: Engram — persistent memory & continuity for AI coding agents. A portable brain of skills and methods any project can adopt. Runs 100% locally.

plugins.name: engram
plugins.description: Portable shared brain for AI coding agents: capabilities (skills), methods (OBrain schema, QA & merge gate, LLM-Wiki ops), and an optional human/personal-truth layer. No telemetry, no auto-sync.
